search_spec.name: stable_ensemble_conditional_pullback
search_spec.prediction_reduction: single-threaded fixed tree order after parallel deterministic fitting
search_spec.interaction: funding score passes and (28-day range width exceeds its train funding quantile or completed-daily range position is below its train funding quantile)
search_spec.premium_rule: premium source score passes its train-only source quantile
search_spec.selection_rule: absolute formal gate plus at least one Manhattan-adjacent passing cell
search_spec.oos_policy: 2024+ remains physically sealed until a separate stability audit and freeze commit

search_summary.promotion_status: requires separate stability audit and freeze before OOS
